_publications._publicationTitle: A transcriptomic, proteomic, and functional genetic atlas dissects neurofibromin function in the peripheral nervous system.

_contextSnippet: CRISPRi system to repress NF1 in immortalized peripheral nerve (iPN) cells, which was validated by qRT-PCR
details: Successfully achieved NF1, PTPN11, and SOS2 repression in iPN cells with measurable phenotypic effects on cell growth and drug sensitivity
